_comment: Source registry for the relocation-app packing corpus (ground-truth v0). Each source has a stable id referenced by seed-claims.json. quality: primary = official university ISS/OISS page; blog = consultancy/personal packing guide; forum = Quora/community thread (Reddit blocked Anthropic crawler, so community consensus is drawn from comment-driven aggregator blogs); secondary = price-comparison/reference site.
generatedFrom: deep-research workflow wf_a4cb7f0c-7f3, run 2026-07-13 (synthesis salvaged manually after org spend-limit interrupted the verify/synthesize phase)
